channel.title: Haproxy on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Haproxy on DevOpsTales

item.title: Migrating from NGINX Ingress Controller to HAProxy: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: The Kubernetes community announced the retirement of Ingress NGINX with best-effort maintenance ending March 2026. This guide walks you through a safe, tested migration path to HAProxy Kubernetes Ingress Controller—with code examples, annotation mappings, and production tips.
